task_completion.description: Navigate to the WMS settings page in the GeoServer web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the GeoServer web interface at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ with the 'WMS' configuration page open (usually found under the 'Services' menu).

task_completion.description: Set the Max rendering memory to 131072 KB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field labeled 'Max rendering memory (KB)' or similar contains the exact value '131072'.

task_completion.description: Set the Max rendering time to 120 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field labeled 'Max rendering time (s)' or similar contains the exact value '120'.
The checkbox next to 'Enable watermark' (or similar watermark setting) is checked/ticked.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the WMS settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Submit' or 'Save' button at the bottom of the WMS settings page, followed by a visual confirmation such as a green success banner or a redirection back to the main services page.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the web browser and GeoServer UI, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or REST API scripts) to change the settings.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ and the standard GeoServer interface is visible, not a text editor or a local HTML mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) open in the screenshots being used to alter the page text or state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The default values for GeoServer WMS settings are 65536 KB for Max rendering memory, 60 seconds for Max rendering time, and the watermark is disabled. The agent must change these to 131072 KB, 120 seconds, and enabled (checked) respectively. Verify that the agent actually inputs these new values rather than leaving the defaults.
